hooks.command: file_path=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); if echo "$file_path" | grep -qE '\.env($|\.)|/env/'; then echo "🚫 환경변수 파일 직접 편집이 차단되었습니다: $file_path — config/env/ 경로를 확인하세요." >&2; exit 2; fi

file_path=$(python3 -c "import sys,json; print(json.load(sys.stdin).get('tool_input',{}).get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null); case "$file_path" in *'src/app/(frontend)'*.tsx|*'src/app/(frontend)'*.jsx) cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && node scripts/check-design-rules.mjs "$file_path" >&2 || exit 2;; esac
